centrality.description: Files touched by many unique engineers = load-bearing infrastructure. Score weights your contribution share by file popularity.

influence.description: Files you contributed to early that others subsequently built on. Captures 'I laid the foundation, others extended it'.

breadth.description: Unique modules (top-level directories) contributed to. Broad contributors reduce silos and multiply team-wide value.
